internal_issues.description: Transverse-mode escape preempted. New paragraph integrated from analyst EXP-198 (Schumann defense: quarter-wave vs transverse mode, three compounding arguments).
Stale terminology 'toroidal sump node' replaced with current V51.2 label 'Sub-terrestrial structure' across detail_claim, tldr_evidence, tldr_verdict, detail_verdict_text.
Refraction-cascade paragraph: fixed r range (17,000-20,015 → 15,500-20,015 km so H=1,400 km is correct; H(17000)=1188 not 1400).
Dropped vague 'gravitational-index coupling effects catastrophically inconsistent with GRACE' sentence (assertion without mechanism).
Replaced generic source list (IGRF/tide gauges) in detail_verdict_text with gravity-specific sources: GRACE/GRACE-FO Level-2, Pappa 2019, Ferraccioli 2011, Forte 2010.

Fixed internal inconsistency: paragraph 3 used South Magnetic Pole (~65,000-67,000 nT) while paragraph 2 used geographic south pole (~55,000 nT). Updated paragraph 3 to geographic south pole (~55,000 nT per WMM2025).
Softened 'explicitly INTERMAGNET/CHAOS-7' overclaim to 'surface-observatory sources the dome home page highlights (INTERMAGNET and CHAOS-7, which dome mischaracterizes as paleomagnetic)'.
Forced disjunction missing third horn (aetheric retreat). Yeeted to EXP-204 for analyst.
finding field 'Dome adds no equation' corrected to 'Dome adds no dome-derived equation — its FSF scaling formula is empirically calibrated per-station, not derived from disc-radius geometry'.
